evals.prompt: Check this NotebookLM brief against the source bundle.
evals.expected_behavior: Read brief + bundle manifest; produce verification report with source coverage, unsupported claims, contradictions, overgeneralizations, spot-checks, follow-up prompts.

evals.prompt: Verify whether NotebookLM missed or hallucinated anything important.
evals.expected_behavior: Same report; if no issues found, emit a short positive verdict with what's reliable for vs what to spot-check.

evals.prompt: Compare downloaded NotebookLM notes to the cluster papers.
evals.expected_behavior: Coverage report; cap PDF spot-checks at 3 per run; quote brief line numbers.

evals.prompt: Audit this brief before I send it to my advisor.
evals.expected_behavior: Run full verification; emit explicit Verdict section so the user knows what to trust vs flag for spot-check; suggest follow-up NotebookLM prompts to close gaps.
